channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Tiger Woods' immediate goal: Keep his son from beating him in golf for 18 holes
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Tiger Woods turns 49 at the end of the month and he has one pressing goal that relates to his golf. He wants to prolong that inevitable day when his son beats him over 18 holes.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former NFL coach Jon Gruden says pass interference is 'biggest concern,' suggests cap on penalty yardage
item.description: The NFL's pass interference rule often sparks controversy, and a Super Bowl-winning coach wants the league to impose penalty yardage like college football.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jalen Hurts fined for wearing mismatched cleats during Eagles' win over Steelers, AP source says
item.description: A person familiar with the decision says Philadelphia Eagles quarterback Jalen Hurts was fined $5,628 by the NFL for wearing mismatched cleats that were not “constitutional team colors.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Christian Walker agrees to $60 million, 3-year contract with Astros, AP source says
item.description: A a person familiar with the negotiations tells The Associated Press that Gold Glove first baseman Christian Walker and the Houston Astros have agreed to a $60 million, three-year contract.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trinity Rodman rips former NBA star dad for ‘joke’ apology after opening up about strained relationship
item.description: Dennis Rodman's public apology to his daughter, Trinity Rodman, was not received well by the professional soccer player, who called it a "joke" in a social media post Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Netflix signs US broadcast deal with FIFA for the Women's World Cup in 2027 and 2031
item.description: GENEVA (AP) — Netflix has secured the U.S. broadcasting rights to the Women’s World Cup in 2027 and 2031 as the streaming giant continues its push into live sports. The deal announced Friday is the most significant FIFA has signed with a streaming service for a major tournament.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Penn State and SMU carry the weight of history into their CFP debuts. They're both trying to shed it
item.description: DaQuan Jones remembers the chaos. The uncertainty. The sanctions. The aftermath. How could he not? He and the rest of his Penn State teammates — those that stuck around anyway — lived through it.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lindsey Vonn's coach suggests she'll be competitive in her return to World Cup skiing at age 40
item.description: ST. MORITZ, Switzerland (AP) — How fast can she go on her titanium knee? And how competitive will she be? Those are the big questions surrounding Lindsey Vonn’s comeback to World Cup ski racing this weekend at age 40 after nearly six years of retirement.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers' Brock Purdy impresses after gifting offensive lineman brand-new cars for Christmas
item.description: San Francisco 49ers quarterback Brock Purdy gifted his offensive line nine brand-new cars for Christmas, as he is expected to land a big contract extension this offseason.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 2024 obituaries: We said a final farewell to these famous people
item.description: They were politicians, businesspeople, athletes, artists and entertainers. This year, we said goodbye to such beloved figures as James Earl Jones, Maggie Smith, Bill Walton, Louis Gossett Jr. and Teri Garr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Bulls beat Celtics 117-108 in Boston
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Celtics forward Jaylen Brown took issue with back-to-back technical fouls called on coach Joe Mazzulla and himself late in the fourth quarter of Boston’s 117-108 loss to the Chicago Bulls on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Mikheyev stars as 'Hawks beat Kraken 3-1 for 3rd straight win
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Ilya Mikheyev scored two more goals, Arvid Soderblom made 27 saves and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Seattle Kraken 3-1 on Thursday night for their third straight win. Teuvo Teravainen had two assists as Chicago closed out a perfect three-game homestand.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: SJSU responds to volleyball player mass exodus after trans athlete scandal rocked program
item.description: San Jose State University has spoken out after seven of its players entered the transfer portal following a season marred by controversy and centered on one transgender player on the team.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Towns relishes an enjoyable return to Minnesota, from the roar of the crowd to a blowout win
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Karl-Anthony Towns took some time to reflect on nine formative NBA seasons in Minnesota, arriving to the arena early for the morning shootaround before the rest of the New York Knicks.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Broncos show growing pains in second-half collapse to Chargers
item.description: In a pivotal Thursday Night, AFC West battle in Los Angeles with plenty of playoff implications, we saw no lack of offense.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Transgender athlete controversy sparks opposing protests at California school board meeting
item.description: A board meeting at the Riverside Unified School District was preceded by protests for and against transgender inclusion amid an ongoing lawsuit.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ex-NFL star Adrian Peterson has warrants out for arrest: report
item.description: Former NFL running back Adrian Peterson reportedly had warrants out for his arrest in Texas after failing to appear in court for child support cases.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: RFK Stadium site provision removed from federal spending bill, a blow to the Commanders and NFL
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A provision to transfer the land that is the site of the old RFK Stadium from the federal government to the District of Columbia is no longer included in Congress' slimmed-down, short-term spending bill that lawmakers are racing to pass before a government shutdown.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Patrick Mahomes, previously critical of Chiefs' tight schedule, will play despite ankle injury
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs quarterback Patrick Mahomes' playing status was considered week to week due to an ankle injury, but it now appears he will not miss any time.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Real Salt Lake's 2025 MLS season kicks off Feb. 22 with away game in San Jose
item.description: Real Salt Lake unveiled its entire 2025 MLS Season on Thursday, along with a few crucial dates such as the club's return to the CONCACAF Champions Cup.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: A parade, 5K and tailgate party: San Diego ramps up for Holiday Bowl
item.description: With the 45th annual DIRECTV Holiday Bowl matchup between Syracuse and Washington State just about a week away, San Diego is hosting a lineup of events leading up to the big game.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: As Caleb Williams gains experience, Bears must find meaning in final 3 games of dismal 2024 season
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. (AP) — The Chicago Bears continue to get the same result regardless of how they approach the assignment. Quarterback Caleb Williams looked physically and mentally beaten at the end of Monday night’s 30-12 loss to the Minnesota Vikings, the eighth straight Bears defeat.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: White Sox announce list of players to attend SoxFest 2025
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have announced a list of seven players and eight prospects who will join fans at SoxFest 2025, which is making its return after a four-year hiatus, featuring new fan experiences and a "State of the White Sox" address with Manager Will Venable and front office leadership.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Isaac Wilson decides to return to Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Upon second thought, Isaac Wilson is returning to Utah. Eight days after announcing he was entering the transfer portal, Wilson announced that he is returning to Utah, where will compete for the starting quarterback job with New Mexico transfer Devon Dampier.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 49ers suspend De'Vondre Campbell for 3 games
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The San Francisco 49ers have suspended linebacker De'Vondre Campbell after he refused to play in Thursday’s game against the Los Angeles Rams, General Manager John Lynch announced Monday. The suspension is for the team's final three games of the season.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: LeBron James returns to score 18 in Lakers' win vs Grizzlies after missing 2 games with foot injury
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James returned to the Los Angeles Lakers on Sunday night in a 116-110 victory over the Memphis Grizzlies after a two-game break. James is fighting a left foot injury and was away from the team most of last week because of personal reasons.
item.dc:creator: KYLE GLASER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Saquon Barkley slowed by 'minor' injury, loses ground in pursuit of Dickerson's record
item.description: Eagles running back Saquon Barkley had a setback in his chase of the NFL season rushing record when he appeared slowed by an undisclosed injury.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mahomes throws 2 TD passes, leaves with ankle injury in Chiefs' 21-7 win. X-rays negative on star QB
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — The only thing the Chiefs had to worry about in the final minutes Sunday was Patrick Mahomes' ankle.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Shiffrin recovering after abdominal surgery to clean out deep puncture wound suffered in race crash
item.description: Mikaela Shiffrin is recovering after undergoing abdominal surgery on Thursday night to clean out a puncture wound she received in a giant slalom crash two weeks ago.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah runs road winning streak to six straight with 4-3 victory
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club has become true road warriors. Clayton Keller scored a power-play goal with 43.8 seconds remaining and the Utah Hockey Club rallied to beat the San Jose Sharks 4-3 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU gets defensive against Wyoming in 68-49 win
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Mawot Mag and Dawson Baker came off the bench and combined for 22 points, sparking BYU men’s basketball to 68-49 win over Wyoming on Saturday night at the Delta Center. "It was a good win," said BYU head coach Kevin Young.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Division 1-AA State Championship: Lincoln 28, Pittsburg 26
item.description: Lincoln captures their second State title in 3 years, winning the Division 1-AA State Championship over Pittsburg with a final score of 28-26.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Trump gets warm welcome as he watches Army-Navy game alongside key allies, nominees and Daniel Penny
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump huddled with allies and a Republican cause célèbre at Saturday's Army-Navy football game, taking in one of the most storied rivalries in college sports while spotlighting his emerging national security team.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, TARA COPP and AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, Fox 5
